title: Welcome, Projector
description: Invitation-based. Seen, not consumed. The wisdom of waiting until you are recognized.
learningGoal: A newly identified Projector understands the invitation-based strategy without feeling diminished — the design is about recognition, not weakness.
keyPoints: Projectors carry no defined motor — energy works through them rather than being generated by them
You are designed to guide, but only when invited and recognized
Uninvited guidance lands as intrusion; invited guidance lands as wisdom
Success is your signature; bitterness is the signal something is misaligned
forbiddenClaims: Projectors are weaker than other types
you must wait forever for invitations
toneNotes: Quiet and reverent. Many Projectors arrive worn down from trying to keep up with sacral types. Restore dignity without overclaiming.
narration_script:
You are a Projector.

Twenty-one percent of the population. You do not carry a defined motor of your own. Energy works through you rather than being generated by you. This means you do not run on the same fuel as a Generator. You are not designed to outwork them. You are designed to see them.

Your gift is perception. You see what others miss — the angle, the leverage, the inefficiency, the pattern hidden inside the noise. This is why you have always been the one others turn to when they want clarity about themselves.

You are designed to guide. But only when invited and recognized.

Uninvited guidance lands as intrusion. Even when you are right. Especially when you are right. The other person did not ask. The energy of your perception, sent without invitation, becomes pressure they did not consent to.

Invited guidance lands as wisdom. The same words, in the same voice, met by a question that was actually asked, become exactly what was needed.

The strategy is to wait for the invitation. To rest in the meantime. To let yourself be seen rather than chasing visibility.

Success is your signature. Bitterness is the signal something is misaligned.

Welcome to your blueprint.

output_metadata.title: Welcome, Projector — Your Energy Blueprint
output_metadata.description: A personal welcome for Projectors. Invitation as strategy. Perception as gift. Success as signature.
